reason: Backend contract and repo conventions relevant to the existing convert routes.
PC swap integration spans backend API contracts, adapter mapping, page state, and tests.
Reuse existing PC API adapter and wallet mapping patterns instead of adding parallel shapes.

summary: Added directional amount limits for convert pairs: DB migration adds target_min_amount/target_max_amount; user quote validation picks source or target limits by direction; admin create/list/detail/audit and PC pair adapters now carry both limit sets.
